metadata.description: Central catalogue of source records used or available for the Karmein Chan Knowledge File.
metadata.cataloguing_basis: The Cruel Song source index plus currently referenced source_ids in people.json, places.json, open_questions.json and timeline.json.
notes: Entries marked non_disclosable_source_details intentionally avoid exposing private or sensitive source locators.
